title: Financial Quantitative Analysts
description: Develop quantitative techniques to inform securities investing, equities investing, pricing, or valuation of financial instruments. Develop mathematical or statistical models for risk management, asset optimization, pricing, or relative value analysis.

tasks.text: Apply mathematical or statistical techniques to address practical issues in finance, such as derivative valuation, securities trading, risk management, or financial market regulation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Research or develop analytical tools to address issues such as portfolio construction or optimization, performance measurement, attribution, profit and loss measurement, or pricing models.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Interpret results of financial analysis procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop core analytical capabilities or model libraries, using advanced statistical, quantitative, or econometric techniques.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Define or recommend model specifications or data collection methods.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Produce written summary reports of financial research results.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain or modify all financial analytic models in use.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide application or analytical support to researchers or traders on issues such as valuations or data.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Devise or apply independent models or tools to help verify results of analytical systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collaborate in the development or testing of new analytical software to ensure compliance with user requirements, specifications, or scope.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with other financial engineers or analysts on trading strategies, market dynamics, or trading system performance to inform development of quantitative techniques.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Consult traders or other financial industry personnel to determine the need for new or improved analytical applications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Research new financial products or analytics to determine their usefulness.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify, track, or maintain metrics for trading system operations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop methods of assessing or measuring corporate performance in terms of environmental, social, and governance (ESG) issues.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with product development teams to research, model, validate, or implement quantitative structured solutions for new or expanded markets.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare requirements documentation for use by software developers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop solutions to help clients hedge carbon exposure or risk.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop tools to assess green technologies or green financial products, such as green hedge funds or social responsibility investment funds.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assess the potential impact of climate change on business financial issues, such as damage repairs, insurance costs, or potential disruptions of daily activities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Analyze pricing or risks of carbon trading products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
